name: Datang Telecom Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Datang Telecom Technology Co., Ltd. operates in the integrated circuit (IC) design, software and services, terminal design, and mobile Internet sectors in China. The company offers products and services in the areas of IC design, including intelligent terminal, smart security, and automotive electronic chips; terminal design, smartphone, data terminal, and industry terminal services; and smart cards, car networking, sensor networks, and video surveillance products. The company also offers software and services consisting of telecom operation support systems, information security solutions, and platform products; communication devices for wired and wireless access, and optical communication products; and energy saving products. In addition, it provides security chip and mobile terminal solutions for IC design; wireless access and BOSS solutions for operators; smart city and traffic solutions; and smart business center and wisdom tourism products, as well as traffic, agriculture, water, education, energy, and multi-service convergence scheduling platform for industrial applications, and mobile Internet and government information solutions for public services. The company was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
